mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, country_name, university_name, gpa_value, major_courses, start_date, end_date FROM student_exchange_experience WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_exchange_experience(user_id, country_name, university_name, gpa_value, major_courses, start_date, end_date) VALUES(#{userId}, #{countryName}, #{universityName}, #{gpaValue}, #{majorCourses}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE country_name = VALUES(country_name), university_name = VALUES(university_name), gpa_value = VALUES(gpa_value), major_courses = VALUES(major_courses), start_date = VALUES(start_date), end_date = VALUES(end_date)
